transcript.text:
*Transporting Cockles into Tzuyang's belly
This whole tank costs about $6400?
*The Cockle looks like a Bird
Cockles are the most expensive type clams
*The most expensive clam: Cockle Mukbang
*I'll just eat about 200 because they're expensive
What in the world...
How many KG does an average person eat including the weight of the shell?
I'm curious
Hello everyone!
I am here at NamDang-Ri
I heard that it's Cockle season right now So I'm here to eat some Cockles
I never tried them before
Clams usually cost so much..
Cockles and Scallops cost so much out of the type of clams
*Ireh Seafood (Hongseong-Gun)

*Hongseong county is known for their Cockles
Twist it sideways
*Shaped like a bird's beak
It really looks like a bird!
Right? It's 75,000 won per KG (Market Price) [$64 USD] Without the shell
This whole tank will cost $6400!?
*Time to eat!
Oh it's right here. Cockles.
You said how much cockles go for per kg?
75,000 won ($64 USD)
Wow, very expensive..
Then I'll go ahead and order 5kgs first
Do people eat it raw? like sashimi?
Yes, you can eat them raw.
Is it good?
You can try it yourself

Okay, I'll take 1kg raw cockles
*Seafood Predator Tzuyang
*Will be devouring all the Cockles today
*Around 13kgs (including the shell) *Meat: 5kg *5kg: 375,000 won ($320 USD) *5kg: Around 165 Cockles
We have to prepare 13kgs of cockles to provide 5kgs of cockle meat
About 6 adults will feast with this amount
*She Can't Do It.
6 Grown-up men
How is she going to eat all of this by herself
There's no way. She can't do it.
Cockles are an expensive type of shrimp(?) right?
Wait, shrimp? Oops
They start with the same syllable. So confusing!
*Yes, it's the cockle's fault
They said that it was over 100,000 won per kg last year ($85 USD)
But now it dropped to 75,000 won per kg. ($64 USD)

The 1kg we're talking about here is not with the weight of the shell
Solely for the weight of the meat
I get super excited whenever I eat seafood
Is it ready?
This is raw cockles
That's a lot of food! 5kg is that much?
Yes, you can't finish it all
I can't eat it all? No way, there's no way you'll eat it all
You'll need 6 grown-up men to finish all of it
Those 6 people will feast with this much. How are you going to finish it
This is 1kg of cockles Raw (around 33)
And we have.. wow that's a lot
This is 4kgs (around 132) cockles to be cooked
These are live cockles here. I have to peel about this much to make that 5kg dish right there
*You're eating this much
Thank you. You can't eat this much.

Put these in here to boil
For about how long?
About 7 seconds
Nevermind. 10 seconds
*Got it!
I will try it raw for my first bite
I'm so excited to be trying this right now
Not sure if it will be good eaten raw
First off, it's not fishy
The texture is very nice
It has that distinct clam taste
The savory tastes
You guys might hear and think that it's crunchy
But it's very soft
10-second counter
The owner said 10 seconds

*I will count fast because I want to eat it
Cook it slightly
I'll dip it in soy sauce this time
It's good!
The texture..
Something I can't explain
This part is a crunchy texture
And it's very soft and smooth over here
*Now that she knows it's delicious..
*Waiting Area for Black Hole Tzuyang
*Come out one by one!
Like this
Cheers
This looks like a little birdie
*Entrance to the Black Hole
It's delicious

Right, someone gave me plum juice
*Mouth-Bottle-Opener
*Mini Fuel Station
These are not salty at all
There's no more left?
*Reservation for a Group
This is like Cockle Noodles
It's good when it's fully cooked
*Lettuce going into the Black Hole
*Kimchi is welcomed too
I want to cook Ramyun with this
*$65 Cockle Ramyun
*Don't go anywhere! Stay tuned!
I can see the bottom already
*Time to order more?
*Camera's death-by-working-overtime

*Tzuyang bringing it back to life
You guys see me? Okay!
I will eat about that much raw
One more bite of the raw cockle
Okay I'll give you 5 (to the camera man)
Is it too little? 5?
They are expensive!
2 birdies
I prefer to eat them fully cooked
I can't let a single piece go to waste!
It's tasty
*Cleared
Yummy Yummy
Handmade noodles in here would be amazing
I can't even imagine
Should I add the noodles in here? And make a separate pot for the ramen?

*It's calling for some noodles
I.. brought something
I peeled everything off
and brought the shells
Did you really eat that much already?!
What in the world!?
You ate this much already!
I can't even imagine!
About 165 cockle shells (13 kg)
That's amazing..
It's a mountain
*Preparing to make handmade noodle soup
Can I have 1 serving? I also want some ramyun after
Thank you
In goes the cockles
I think it's ready

Wrap it around with Kimchi
This is it
Cool it down a bit, It's still hot
It's very good! The noodles are amazing!
That's so good. I should've ordered 2.
The soup is breathtaking
It's insane!
Noodles and the Cockle
*This means it's good
Now for a bite with kimchi
It looks good, right?
I thought you were going to eat Ramyun too
This is too good
It's amazing
*Today's main dish: Handmade Noodle Soup
This is crazy. It tastes so good.

I don't think I'll be needing the Ramyun
Can I have 1 more order, please? A little more soup as well
What?
Did I eat all the cockles that were in here?
I'm so happy!
It became a little bland
I shouldn't have added too much soup
Oh no!
*2nd round of the handmade noodles
I want to ask for more Kimchi
But just for a specific part
*Camera-man going for some
*Eyes are faster than hands
Here eat some kimchi
So I can get a new plate of kimchi
I didn't want to eat those parts of the kimchi

I'm sorry I spit everywhere!
Thank you! *New plate of kimchi
You want some more noodles?
It tastes so good. It's good right?
Cockles too
Let's just add everything in here
*Cleared once again!
Let's eat more.
*1kg Cockles+2 packs of Ramyun= Dessert
I'm going to cook 2 packs of Ramyun with this plate of Cockle
*Cockle soup as well
*Whole plate of cockles (1kg)
*76,000 won Ramyun ($65 USD)
It tastes even better like this..
It definitely does taste better
I don't need any dipping sauce

*Adding 1kg to the Cockle Shell Graveyard!
You ate all of this?
Good Lord..
*Shocked
You ate the handmade noodles AND the ramyun?
2 of each..
What in the world!
*Cleaning up last bits
Thanks for the food!
Thanks everyone!
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
